title: Signal in an active generate block causes compiler error `Can't find definition of variable ...`
body:
```
module m;
  if (1) logic a;

  initial
    $display(a);
endmodule
```

Can be found in LRM page 796.
```
$ verilator --binary m.sv
%Error: main.sv:5:12: Can't find definition of variable: 'a'
    5 |   $display(a);
```

Version: Verilator 5.003 devel rev v5.002-137-ga9ff0a0f3. (latest) on Archlinux

Can someone confirm this?
